## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent blog post "Is Puerto Vallarta Safe" performing exceptionally well, ranking as top post](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [SEO strategy mixing low-volume long-tail keywords with high-volume opportunities showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Workflow friction identified in content formatting when transferring from Google Docs to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Team to explore solutions for automating content publishing and improving formatting issues](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - ["Is Puerto Vallarta Safe" blog post attracting significant traffic, now the top-performing post](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Puerto Vallarta Nightlife content also starting to rank well](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Strategy of alternating low-volume long-tail keywords (e.g., "what to do in \[destination\] in \[month\]") with high-volume opportunities proving effective](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Identified high-potential keywords: "When is the best time to visit" for various destinations](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Developing comprehensive beach guides for each destination (e.g., best Cabo beaches)](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Creating content around star tours to drive more traffic to tour pages](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Exploring Mexico-related keywords with high search volume (e.g., "drinking age in Mexico")](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Considering cross-destination content to link between Adventure Group properties](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Workflow and Technical Challenges

  - [Current issue: Formatting breaks when copying from Google Docs to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Spacing between paragraphs disappears, requiring manual fixes](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Team exploring solutions: HTML-adapted versions, API integration for automatic publishing](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Concerns about potential SEO impact of manual spacing fixes (e.g., code bloat)](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### Content Refreshment and Updates

  - [Lucero currently fixing photo linking issues across all three sites](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Updating outdated information (e.g., tour name changes)](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Team to consider strategic refreshment of well-performing content across sites](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### Collaboration and Resources

  - [Lucero creating a matrix of tours with descriptions, durations, and age requirements](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Team to consolidate tour information in a central sheet for easy reference](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to keep exploring automation options for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Lucero to add tour matrix to existing spreadsheet for centralized information](https://fathom.video/share/a9REiGav4XtZb_RwKUXFmdx2y-b9m3xW?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
